since_last: 63% of 89 AI names green; Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical leads +1.88%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 63% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.68% · BTC +3.09% · Gold +1.95% · Nasdaq100 +0.47%. 63% of 89 AI names are green — a broad bid. Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical is doing the heavy lifting at +1.88%.

cards.headline: Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at +1.88%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -0.58%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AVAV is the standout at +15.11%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +15.11%, OKLO +5.82%, OKLO +5.82%, SMR +4.53%, SMCI +4.45%. Laggards: DELL -3.89%, META -3.17%, KLAC -2.90%, TSLA -2.84%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.83% at $160.43
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.83% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
